domain_context: B2B CRM Mobile Web App for Indian Wholesaler (WhatsApp-like)
design_philosophy: Utilitarian WhatsApp-Green: Familiar, fast, reliable, and touch-optimized. High utility density combined with organic green brand markers to invoke the trust of native messaging apps.

layout_and_spacing.navigation: Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile app feel.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous vertical spacing. Use p-4 and p-6 inside cards and containers.
layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height (h-12) for all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, list items) to ensure mobile tap accuracy.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Use pill shapes (rounded-full) for buttons and tags. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards/bottom sheets.

component_guidelines.buttons: Pill shape (rounded-full). Primary uses brand green. Must have clear hover/active states.
component_guidelines.inputs: Must use text-base (16px) to prevent iOS auto-zoom. Minimal borders, slight gray background (bg-gray-50) when resting.
component_guidelines.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90, 1px top border (border-gray-200). Active tab uses primary green.
component_guidelines.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), minimal shadow (shadow-sm). Avoid heavy drop-shadows.
component_guidelines.lists: Dense list items for CRM. Left avatar (2-letter CAPS tag), title (party name), subtitle (city/state). Right-aligned action (call/message).
component_guidelines.chat_preview: Use the provided whatsapp_doodle_bg as a background for the preview container. Message bubbles should be rounded (WhatsApp style: rounded-2xl with one sharp corner) and use #DCF8C6 for outgoing.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Slide-up for bottom sheets. Quick fade for tab switching.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders for CRM list. Circular progress for WhatsApp broadcast.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 2. Consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 or w-6 h-6).

images.description: Veer Electrical official brand logo. Used in header, login, or settings.
WhatsApp-style doodle background for the bot message template preview section.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure green buttons have white text (sufficient contrast).
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='broadcast-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to match the mobile-native pill/rounded aesthetic.
Implement a Bottom Navigation Bar for the primary routes (Broadcaster, CRM, Catalog, Bot, Senders, Settings).
For the Bot Message preview, use the whatsapp_doodle_bg image as the container background, and style bubbles like native WhatsApp.
Ensure the layout prevents horizontal scrolling on mobile.
Do not use card components excessively. Go for cardless, flat, or minimal border styles with white backgrounds over the gray app background (#F0F2F5).
Write components as .js (or .jsx) files, avoiding TypeScript syntax as the environment uses JavaScript.
